privacyPolicy.title: AgriMart Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: AgriMart values your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we keep it secure.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.intro: We collect information you provide directly, including:
section1.item1: Full name, email address, and phone number during registration
section1.item2: Location data (mandal, district, state) for service area matching
section1.item5: Chat messages between customers and transport dealers

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.item1: Create and manage your account on AgriMart
section2.item3: Match customers with nearby transport dealers
section2.item4: Calculate and display real-time mandi prices for crops
section2.item5: Send order confirmations and delivery status updates
section2.item6: Improve platform features and user experience

section3.title: 3. Data Security
section3.content: We take security seriously. AgriMart uses secure authentication methods including token-based sessions and encrypted password storage. All sensitive data is transmitted over HTTPS. We regularly review our security practices to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

section4.title: 4. Data Sharing
section4.intro: AgriMart does not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Limited data sharing occurs only in the following situations:
section4.item1: Transport dealers receive customer delivery address and contact details only for the purpose of completing the assigned delivery.
section4.item2: Farmers receive order details to fulfill crop requests.
section4.item3: Data may be disclosed if required by law or governmental authority.

section5.title: 5. Cookies and Session Data
section5.content: AgriMart uses browser localStorage to maintain your login session and store temporary order data (such as selected dealer, final negotiated price, and cart items). This data is local to your device and is cleared when you log out. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.

section6.title: 6. Location Data
section6.content: AgriMart may request access to your device location to help match you with transport dealers operating in your area. Location data is used only for service area matching and is not stored permanently beyond what is needed for the current session.

section7.title: 7. User Rights
section7.item1: Access and update your profile information through your Account page
section7.item2: Request deletion of your account by contacting support
section7.item3: Request a copy of the data associated with your account
section7.footer: To exercise any of these rights, please use the Support section within the app.

section8.title: 8. Children's Privacy
section8.content: AgriMart is intended for users who are 18 years of age or older. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If we become aware that a minor has provided personal data, we will delete it promptly.

section9.title: 9. Retention of Data
section9.content: We retain your account and order data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. If you request account deletion, we will remove your personal data within a reasonable period, except where retention is required by law.

section10.title: 10. Policy Changes
section10.content: AgriMart may update this privacy policy periodically to reflect changes in law, technology, or our services. Users will be notified of significant changes through the platform. Your continued use of AgriMart after updates are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
section10.footer: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the Support section in the app.

privacyPolicy.footer: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the Support section in the app.

termsConditions.title: AgriMart Terms & Conditions
termsConditions.intro: Welcome to AgriMart. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully before placing any order or using any service.

userRoles.title: 1. User Roles
userRoles.content: AgriMart provides services for farmers, customers, transport dealers, and administrators. Each user must use the platform strictly according to their assigned role. Misuse of roles or impersonation of another user type is strictly prohibited.

accountResponsibility.title: 2. Account Responsibility
accountResponsibility.content: Users must provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information during registration. You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. AgriMart will not be liable for any loss arising from unauthorized access due to failure to protect your credentials.

productListings.title: 3. Product Listings
productListings.content: Farmers must provide accurate crop details including crop name, quantity, quality grade, and harvest information. Crop prices are automatically updated using government mandi price APIs to maintain transparency and fair market value. AgriMart reserves the right to remove listings that contain false or misleading information.

ordersPayments.title: 4. Orders and Payments
ordersPayments.content: Customers must complete payment before order confirmation. AgriMart processes all transactions securely. Once an order is placed and payment is successful, cancellation is subject to the cancellation policy. All prices shown are inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.

deliveryServices.title: 5. Delivery Services
deliveryServices.content: Transport dealers registered on AgriMart are responsible for delivering crops safely from farmers to customers within the agreed timeframe and location. Delivery charges are negotiated directly between the customer and the transport dealer through the in-app chat. AgriMart is not liable for delays caused by external factors such as weather, road conditions, or unforeseen circumstances.

platformFee.title: 6. Platform Fee
platformFee.content: AgriMart charges a platform service fee of 2% of the total order value, capped at a maximum of ₹100 per order. This fee is used to maintain the platform, ensure data security, and support ongoing services. The fee is clearly shown in the price breakdown before payment is confirmed.

priceNegotiation.title: 7. Price Negotiation
priceNegotiation.content: Transport pricing is negotiated between customers and dealers through the AgriMart chat feature. Once both parties confirm the negotiated price, the agreed amount is binding and reflected in the payment page. AgriMart does not intervene in the price negotiation process.

prohibitedActivities.title: 8. Prohibited Activities
prohibitedActivities.content: Users must not post false or misleading information, attempt to manipulate prices, misuse the platform for illegal activities, harass other users, or attempt to bypass the platform's payment system. Violations may result in account suspension or permanent ban.

disputeResolution.title: 9. Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.content: In case of disputes between buyers, sellers, or transport dealers, users may raise a complaint through the AgriMart support section. AgriMart will investigate and respond within a reasonable timeframe. AgriMart's decision in such matters will be final.

limitationLiability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
limitationLiability.content: AgriMart's liability is limited to the transaction value of the specific order in dispute. AgriMart is not responsible for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform.

policyUpdates.title: 11. Policy Updates
policyUpdates.content: AgriMart reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes are published constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms. Significant changes will be communicated via the platform.

termsConditions.footer: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us through the Support section in the app.
